prompt: I've got three microservices I need running for local dev: a gateway (port 4000), users-service (port 4001), and orders-service (port 4002). They're all in separate directories under ./services/. The gateway depends on both other services. Each one prints 'Server started' when ready. Can you set this up so I can just run one command to start everything?

assertions.description: YAML defines gateway, users-service, and orders-service (names may vary slightly)
Gateway's depends_on includes both other services
users-service and orders-service do not depend on each other
All services have ready: 'Server started' (or similar)
Each service has cwd pointing to ./services/<name>
Uses agent-procs up to start everything with one command
